title: Encounter
description: Authored battle definition binding an enemy wave to a track/beatmap, with an optional rhythmic accent profile (e.g. clave) layered over the beatmap's true meter.

trackId.description: Foreign key into a beatmap.schema.json document.

accentProfile.description: Rhythmic accent pattern (e.g. son_clave_2_3) layered over the beatmap's meterSequence. Never used to represent an actual time signature.
